# Pull Request Template

## Description
Please describe your changes and why they are needed for **Hastia Additions**.

## Related Issue
Link the issue this PR addresses (if applicable):  
Closes #___

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (please explain):

## How to Test
Explain how someone can test your changes:
1. Minecraft version:
2. Forge version:
3. Steps to reproduce / test the feature or fix

## Checklist
- [ ] I have tested my changes in Minecraft
- [ ] My code follows the project’s style guidelines
- [ ] I have added necessary comments and documentation
- [ ] I have updated the wiki/docs if applicable

## Additional Notes
Any other information or context about this PR.
